creator: dmitry_kuleshov@ukr.net
text:
Сase of PCI-E passthrough in guest OS (FreeBSD 11.1releaseP2) WiFi card (WPEA-128N AR5BHB112 based on AR9380 chip) didn't work - legacy drivers try to use INTx instead of MSI.
Can you add in future releases to ath9k drivers MSI support as subscribed in this article:
https://patchwork.kernel.org/patch/9999249/

Thanks.
